## Standing Gates (every track + S91-03 closeout)

| Gate | Command | Pass |
|------|---------|------|
| Build | `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` | 0e |
| Full suite | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | **≥1599 / 0f** |
| ReplayGolden | `--filter ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` | **6/6** |
| C2 proxy | `--filter PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests` | **≥20/20** |
| Hash | `rg -l '17144800277401907079' tests/ data/` | **18** paths |
| Bridge | grep / git diff | **ZERO** `DelegationBridge.cs` hotpath edits |
| Catalog | review only | **extend-only** |
| Scope | git diff | No Addressables bulk import; no store upload; no Baltic reopen; no `unity/` binary asset churn |

Log closeout evidence to `production/qa/evidence/gates-sprint-91-closeout-2026-07-*.log`.

## Automated Tests Required

*No Logic/Integration formula tests for S91 Must Haves — deliverables are markdown specs under `design/assets/specs/`. Regression coverage is the standing gate suite at closeout only.*

## Manual QA Checklist

### S91-01 — Refine C2 + Baltic specs — Config/Data

**Verification method:** Spec audit (diff review) against `/asset-spec` field template  
**Who must sign off:** art-director (or technical-artist) + qa-lead (checklist)  
**Evidence to capture:** Written audit notes in smoke closeout or track PR description

Checklist:
- [ ] `design/assets/specs/c2-ui-assets.md` includes **ASSET-001** umbrella (Command Post panel suite)
- [ ] ASSET-002 umbrella present/expanded in `baltic-patrol-assets.md`
- [ ] Each refined asset has: Category, Dimensions, Format, Naming, Visual Description, Art Bible Anchors, Status
- [ ] Generation Prompt present where applicable (UI/marketing); Audio deferred rows remain description-only
- [ ] Specs cite `design/art/art-bible.md` and post-editor hygiene boundary
- [ ] No Unity C# / Addressables / `Packages/manifest.json` changes in the track

### S91-02 — Refine store capsule pack — Config/Data

**Verification method:** Spec audit vs S70 asset-checklist dims/naming  
**Who must sign off:** art-director + qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture:** Checklist mapping table in PR or closeout

Checklist:
- [ ] ASSET-003 umbrella refined in `store-capsule-assets.md`
- [ ] ASSET-023 main capsule: **616×353** (high-res master noted); naming `ProjectAegis_BalticMainCapsule_v1.png` (or documented alias)
- [ ] ASSET-024 small capsule: **231×87**
- [ ] Screenshot specs ASSET-027…034 map to S70 Baltic capture list (band B, policy, replay, combat domains, jammed, catalog, band C, AAR)
- [ ] Generation prompts include art-bible palette anchors + negatives (no arcade/neon)
- [ ] Explicit scope language: **E7 prep / no store upload** this sprint
- [ ] No binary PNG/SVG production committed as “done” unless separately approved (specs only)

### S91-03 — Closeout — Integration

**Verification method:** `/smoke-check sprint` + standing gates RUN+READ  
**Who must sign off:** producer + qa-lead  
**Evidence:** `production/qa/smoke-sprint-91-closeout-2026-07-*.md` + gates log

Checklist:
- [ ] All standing gates PASS
- [ ] `asset-manifest.md` ASSET-001…003 status → **Specced** (or In Progress with justification)
- [ ] Progress summary counts updated
- [ ] sprint-status.yaml S91 stories done / COMPLETE block
- [ ] Tracks merged via `gt`; ZERO bridge / no Addressables import
- [ ] Forward note: S92 hygiene gate ready

### S91-04 — Manifest progress summary — Config/Data

Checklist:
- [ ] Progress Summary table reflects Specced priority stubs
- [ ] Optional dashboard / status-truth cross-link present if claimed done

### S91-05 — Art bible §8 cross-ref — Config/Data

Checklist:
- [ ] One-line pointers to refined ASSET-001…003 spec paths
- [ ] No new art-bible sections authored

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths before QA hand-off for this sprint (developer via `/smoke-check`):

1. `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 errors
2. `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` — ≥1599 / 0 failed
3. ReplayGoldenSuiteTests — 6/6
4. PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests — ≥20/20
5. Hash `17144800277401907079` preserved (18 paths)
6. Diff audit: no `DelegationBridge` hotpath; no Addressables bulk import; no store upload artifacts required
7. Spec files exist and pass Manual QA Checklist for S91-01 / S91-02

*No game-launch / new-session / save-load smoke — out of scope for specs-only sprint.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

*No playtest sessions required for this sprint.* Specs are design artifacts; visual production and store upload are explicitly out of scope.

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified via documented manual evidence (audit notes / smoke closeout)
- [ ] Manual evidence exists for Config/Data stories (checklist above)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`) before QA hand-off
- [ ] No regressions on standing gates
- [ ] Docs reviewed (peer or `/code-review` on markdown stacks)
- [ ] Story status updated via `/story-done` / sprint-status.yaml
- [ ] Stage remains **Release**

---

| Role | Criterion |
|------|-----------|
| QA | Manual checklists PASS; standing gates PASS at closeout |
| Art | Spec field completeness + art-bible alignment |
| Producer | sprint-status.yaml S91 COMPLETE; S92 dispatch ready |
| User | Ack S91 closeout before S92 gate (collaboration protocol) |
